testsuite.name: agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateTest

testcase.name: createGate registers a pending gate for a task
multiple gates for same workflow are independent
rejectGate transitions to REJECTED and unblocks waiter
approveGate transitions to APPROVED and unblocks waiter

testsuite.system-out: 08:31:27.639 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-1 for workflow wf-1 task summarize — 'Editorial review required' 08:31:27.640 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-1 for workflow wf-1 task A — 'Review A' 08:31:27.640 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-2 for workflow wf-1 task B — 'Review B' 08:31:27.640 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate APPROVED: gate-1 by reviewer — 'ok' 08:31:27.641 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-1 for workflow wf-1 task A — 'Review' 08:31:27.641 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-2 for workflow wf-2 task B — 'Review' 08:31:27.642 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-1 for workflow wf-1 task A — 'Review' agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-1 for workflow wf-1 task A — 'Review A' 08:31:27.643 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-2 for workflow wf-1 task B — 'Review B' 08:31:27.643 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate APPROVED: gate-1 by r1 — 'ok' 08:31:27.643 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate REJECTED: gate-2 by r2 — 'no' 08:31:27.644 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-1 for workflow wf-1 task summarize — 'Review' 08:31:27.644 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate REJECTED: gate-1 by editor-1 — 'Needs more detail' 08:31:27.645 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate created: gate-1 for workflow wf-1 task summarize — 'Review' 08:31:27.645 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.HITLGateManager -- HITL gate APPROVED: gate-1 by editor-1 — 'Looks good'
